input: Real-time remote biometric identification system deployed by police in publicly accessible spaces for law enforcement purposes

expected.notes: v0.1.3 launch-feedback BLOCKER 2a (both Claude-Code + Codex reviewers). v0.1.2 emitted Annex III.1(a) high-risk; the correct classification is Article 5(1)(h) prohibition with the Annex III high-risk path suppressed. The reviewer's verbatim input contains the phrase 'real-time remote biometric identification' which v0.1.3 now matches via the h_realtime_remote_biometric_le lexicon. Cite: EUR-Lex Regulation (EU) 2024/1689, Article 5(1)(h).
